calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Dennis Hayashi; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:12 am and concluding at 9:24 am.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau is represented by George Aposhian, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Iron Man Moving Inc. DBA Iron Man Moving not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JON CODY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Exhibits 1&2 of the Default Declaration of Jon Cody............ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, and against Defendant Iron Man Moving Inc. DBA Iron Man Moving, as follows:

1. Damages: $30,579.32
2. Prejudgment Interest: $14,145.04
3. Costs: $901.69
4. Attorney fees: $2,825.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $48,451.05

Proposed judgment signed and filed.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.(D505)
